description: Ground truth derived from grid icon pixel analysis (majority vote across all full.png screenshots)

algorithm.lock: Count pink pixels (R>180, R-G>60, R-B>50, B>70) in search window; >=10 = locked
algorithm.astral: Count bright yellow pixels (R>220, G>170, B<80) below lock centroid; >=200 = astral
algorithm.search_window_lock: 75x55px at 1080p, positioned to cover scroll drift
